mapper.select: SELECT id, version, is_deleted AS deleted, deleted_at FROM data_record WHERE id = #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}

SELECT r.id, r.aircraft_registration_no, r.aircraft_model, r.airline_code, r.flight_no, r.origin, r.destination, r.source_device_code, r.data_type_code, dt.name AS data_type_name, r.sent_at, r.received_at, r.payload_count, r.parse_status, r.is_deleted AS deleted, r.version FROM data_record r JOIN data_type dt ON dt.code = r.data_type_code WHERE r.id = #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}

SELECT count(*) FROM data_record WHERE id IN
#{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}

SELECT count(*) FROM data_record WHERE is_deleted = false AND id IN
#{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.update: UPDATE data_record SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = now(), deleted_by = #{deletedBy,jdbcType=OTHER}, delete_reason = #{reason}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = false AND version = #{expectedVersion}

UPDATE data_record SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = now(), deleted_by = #{deletedBy,jdbcType=OTHER}, delete_reason = #{reason}, version = version + 1 WHERE is_deleted = false AND id IN
#{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}
UPDATE data_record SET is_deleted = false, deleted_at = NULL, deleted_by = NULL, delete_reason = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = true
